APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Denied

Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Text Ruling

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 501 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

David J. Foran, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Antonio Castellucci.
Plaintiff's Witness Brian Wolk was sworn and examined.
No appearance by Defendant Jim Mack.
After evidence, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed.
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1656 Anza Street, San Francisco, CA. 941118.
Back-due rent $1,335.45 and $44.51 per diem damages from September 1, 2012 to today, in the amount of $3,249.53.
Plaintiff is awarded costs and attorney fees pursuant to memorandum of costs and attornys fees to be submitted to the court on or before the close of business of November 16, 2012 with a courtesy copy deliver to department 514.
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Antonio Castellucci is present. Represented by Brian Wolk.
Attorney David Foran appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jim Mack IS NOT present.
The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of NOV-13-2012 remains on calendar.
